ocr_findings.description: The accessibility/usability spectrum diagram in the image (使えない → アクセシビリティ → 使える → ユーザビリティ → 使いやすい) is rendered as a code block with dashes in the cleaned OCR. Structure is preserved but the visual arrow flow is approximated.

reviewer_notes: Cleaned OCR (Claude Vision re-OCR) produced very faithful output. Definition table for アクセシビリティ and ユーザビリティ is correctly captured with both columns. The exam-tip bullet list at the bottom is fully preserved. Only minor issue is the linear diagram rendered as a code block rather than a visual arrow diagram, which is cosmetically acceptable.
